languages.text: "Ваше стремление к усовершенствованию тела вызывает искреннее восхищение! Уверен, вы осознаете, что делаете".
"Your commitment to perfecting your body is truly awe-inspiring! I'm sure you know what you're doing."
languages.original_text: "Ваше стремление к усовершенствованию тела вызывает искреннее восхищение! Уверен, вы осознаете, что делаете".

traits.locale_text: "Your commitment to perfecting your body is truly awe-inspiring! I'm sure you know what you're doing."
"Your commitment to perfecting your body is truly awe-inspiring! I'm sure you know what you're doing."
"Your commitment to perfecting your body is truly awe-inspiring! I'm sure you know what you're doing."

languages.text: 「あなたの体作りへの情熱は本当に素晴らしいです！あなたが何をやっているのかは、きっとご存じでしょう」
languages.original_text: "Your commitment to perfecting your body is truly awe-inspiring! I'm sure you know what you're doing."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの体作りへの情熱は本当に素晴らしいです！あなたが何をやっているのかは、きっとご存じでしょう。」

languages.text: “您臻于完美肉体的热忱令人敬畏！您肯定清楚自己在做什么。”
languages.original_text: "Your commitment to perfecting your body is truly awe-inspiring! I'm sure you know what you're doing."

traits.locale_text: “您臻于完美肉体的热忱令人敬畏！您肯定清楚自己在做什么。”

languages.text: « Je ne peux qu'être en admiration devant quelqu'un d'aussi déterminé à perfectionner son corps ! Je suis sûr que vous savez ce que vous faites. »
languages.original_text: "Your commitment to perfecting your body is truly awe-inspiring! I'm sure you know what you're doing."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne peux qu'être en admiration devant quelqu'un d'aussi déterminé à perfectionner son corps ! Je suis sûr que vous savez ce que vous faites. »

languages.text: «¡Su dedicación a la perfección corporal es verdaderamente inspiradora! No me cabe duda de que sabe lo que hace».
languages.original_text: "Your commitment to perfecting your body is truly awe-inspiring! I'm sure you know what you're doing."

traits.locale_text: «¡Su dedicación a la perfección corporal es verdaderamente inspiradora! No me cabe duda de que sabe lo que hace».

languages.text: "Bedeninizi mükemmelleştirmeye olan bağlılığınız gerçekten huşu uyandırıcı! Eminim ne yaptığınızı biliyorsunuzdur."
languages.original_text: "Your commitment to perfecting your body is truly awe-inspiring! I'm sure you know what you're doing."

traits.locale_text: "Bedeninizi mükemmelleştirmeye olan bağlılığınız gerçekten huşu uyandırıcı! Eminim ne yaptığınızı biliyorsunuzdur."

languages.text: "Eure Entschlossenheit, Euren Körper zu perfektionieren, ist wirklich bemerkenswert. Ich bin sicher, Ihr wisst, was Ihr tut."
languages.original_text: "Your commitment to perfecting your body is truly awe-inspiring! I'm sure you know what you're doing."

traits.locale_text: "Eure Entschlossenheit, Euren Körper zu perfektionieren, ist wirklich bemerkenswert. Ich bin sicher, Ihr wisst, was Ihr tut."
